title: rhododendron × albescens
intro: Rhododendron × albescens, also known as the white rhododendron, is a hybrid plant species that is derived from the cross between Rhododendron dauricum and Rhododendron dauricum album. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Rhododendron × albescens include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Rhododendron × albescens is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
